items.title: User and session feature tables
items.description: Aggregate click or purchase logs with groupby into one row per user or session, then merge onto a modeling base table for churn, LTV, or recommendation models.

items.title: Dimension enrichment in analytics pipelines
items.description: Left-merge fact tables (orders, events) with slowly changing dimensions (product catalog, store regions) to attach human-readable attributes for reporting and ML features.

items.title: Rolling and cohort summaries
items.description: Groupby on time buckets (week, cohort month) produces cohort retention and revenue curves before joining cohort labels back to individual users with transform or map.

items.title: Label-safe training datasets
items.description: Build ML datasets by merging features with labels only after splits and point-in-time rules, avoiding join leakage in credit, fraud, and healthcare pipelines.
